name: Bug report
about: Report something that is broken or behaving incorrectly

labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

<!-- One-sentence description of the bug. -->

## Steps to reproduce

1. <!-- First action -->
2. <!-- Second action -->
3. <!-- ... -->

## Expected behavior

<!-- What should have happened. -->

## Actual behavior

<!-- What actually happened. Include any error messages verbatim. -->

## Environment

- **App version / commit SHA:** <!-- e.g. v0.1.0 or 7f716ca -->
- **Deployment:** <!-- production / staging / local docker-compose -->
- **Browser / OS:** <!-- e.g. Chrome 124 on macOS 14.4 -->
- **Account / org ID:** <!-- only if relevant, never share credentials -->

## Screenshots / logs

<!-- Attach screenshots, copy/paste relevant log lines, or link to a
     redacted transcript. Do not include real user data, secrets, or
     auth tokens. -->

## Severity

<!-- Pick one. -->

- [ ] Critical — production outage, data loss, security issue
- [ ] High — major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] Medium — feature broken but workaround exists
- [ ] Low — minor cosmetic / quality-of-life issue

## Security

- [ ] I have NOT included any real credentials, tokens, or user data
- [ ] This bug is NOT a security vulnerability (use SECURITY.md for those)
